title: acinos alpinus subsp. nebrodensis
intro: Acinos alpinus subsp. nebrodensis, also known as the Sardinian alpine calamint, is a subspecies of the Acinos alpinus plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Acinos alpinus subsp. nebrodensis include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve mental well-being.
